name: Audio Capture Attempt Detected
description: Detects suspicious activities related to audio capture, including the direct execution of `SoundRecorder.exe` with recording parameters or PowerShell commands designed to interact with audio devices or record sound. This is a critical indicator of an adversary attempting to collect sensitive information from a victim's microphone.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered on the host **{computer_name}**: an attempt at **Audio Capture** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1123**) has been detected. The process **{image}**, running under the user **{user}**, executed the command line **{command_line}**, which contains patterns indicative of recording audio or interacting with audio APIs. The parent process was **{parent_image}**. This activity is a strong indicator of an adversary attempting to collect sensitive information from the host's microphone. Immediate investigation is required to determine if this is a legitimate use of the audio recorder or a malicious attempt to eavesdrop. This is a high-priority event that should be treated as a security incident until proven otherwise.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The path to the executing binary (e.g., 'SoundRecorder.exe' or 'powershell.exe').

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line that indicates audio capture activity.

parameters.name: parent_image
parameters.description: The parent process that initiated the command.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process ran.

parameters.name: computer_name
parameters.description: The name of the computer where the event occurred.
